member.name: T:Pdftools.Render.PDFCopyMode
member.summary: Order of pages to use if several copies of a document are printed.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFDitheringMode.eDitherG3Optimized
member.summary: optimized to compress well with Group 3

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFDitheringMode.eDitherG4Optimized
member.summary: optimized to compress well with Group 4

member.name: T:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption
member.summary: Rendering Options. Some are for printer output only and ignored if used for images rendering without printing. Highest quality is obtained by combining eOptionHighQuality and eOptionBicubic, this combination also requires the most CPU power.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionJPEG
member.summary: Convert bitmaps to the JPEG format if supported to reduce the size of the spool file. (printer output only)

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionPNG
member.summary: Convert bitmaps to the PNG format if supported to reduce the size of the spool file. (printer output only)

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionBanding
member.summary: Use banding to split bitmaps into 64k pieces for older printers with limited memory. (printer output only)

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionType1
member.summary: Convert simple OpenType to Type1 fonts.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionBitmap
member.summary: Send a pre-rendered bitmap to the physical device. (printer output only)

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionTrueType
member.summary: Convert CFF and Type1 fonts to TrueType. Overrules option 'eOptionType1'.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionBilinear
member.summary: Use bilinear interpolation mode to improve image quality. Cannot be combined with option 'eOptionBicubic'.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionBicubic
member.summary: Use bicubic interpolation mode to improve image quality. Cannot be combined with option 'eOptionBilinear'.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionWindows9x
member.summary: Use Windows 9x compatible printer driver interface. Can resolve issues with nested transformation matrices which are not supported by all devices/printer (printer output only)

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionOutlines
member.summary: Convert CFF and Type1 fonts to graphics outlines (GDI+ only). By default, outlines are not rendered as suggested by the PDF Reference. Some fonts require the outlines to be rendered to become readable.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionDisablePatterns
member.summary: Disable patterns; use light gray instead.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionUseFastImages
member.summary: Use fast mode image rendering even in accurate mode. Should help resolving performance issues with complex images and image masks of documents that are to be printed in accurate mode.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionDoNotPrintSig
member.summary: Do not print digital signature appearances.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionPrintOnlySig
member.summary: Print the signature appearance only (without any status appearances).

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionFillStrokes
member.summary: Convert line strokes to a filled path.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionDisableAnnots
member.summary: Disable the drawing of annotations (including Popups).

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionDisableContent
member.summary: Disable the drawing of the page content and draw annotations only.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionEnableOverprint
member.summary: Enable the blending of overprinted colorants.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionPSLevel2
member.summary: Use PostScript language level 2 (printing only, default is 3).

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption.eOptionAutoAccurateMode
member.summary: Automatically switch to accurate mode if necessary, e.g. to render transparent content.

member.name: T:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption2
member.summary: Rendering Options2. Optons for the rendering engine R2 only.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption2.eOptionNoInterpolation
member.summary: Don't use interplation filtering for images.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption2.eOptionNoLowPassFilter
member.summary: Don't use low-pass filtering for images.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption2.eOptionNoHinting
member.summary: Don't use hinting for glyph rendering.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption2.eOptionFitPaths
member.summary: Fit clipping paths to pixel grid.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRendererOption2.eOptionUseBoxFilter
member.summary: Use box filter instead of Gauss filter.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRenderingMode.eModeFast
member.summary: Fast Mode, uses Windows GDI API for rendering. Generally faster and creates smaller output/spool files.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRenderingMode.eModeAccurate
member.summary: Accurate Mode, uses Windows GDI+ API for rendering.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFRenderingMode.eModeDirect
member.summary: Deprecated. Behaves equally as eModeFast. Was used in previous versions for Terminal Servers.

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFLayoutMode.eLayoutPage
member.summary: Render a definite number of pages (e.g. a single page).

member.name: F:Pdftools.Render.PDFLayoutMode.eLayoutDocument
member.summary: Render the whole document (known as continuous page layout)

member.name: T:Pdftools.Render.PDFQualityOption
member.summary: Values in ascending order: draft, low, medium, high.
